6.anchor: You have condemned and killed innocent people,

6.note: Or Don’t they resist you? Doesn’t God oppose you? Aren’t they now accusing you before God?

5.anchor: Do you think the Scriptures have no meaning? They say that God is passionate that the spirit he has placed within us should be faithful to him.
5.note: Or They say that the spirit God has placed within us is filled with envy; They say that the Holy Spirit, whom God has placed within us, opposes our envy.

6.anchor: but gives grace to the humble.”

11.anchor: Don’t speak evil against each other, dear brothers and sisters.

6.anchor: And among all the parts of the body, the tongue is a flame of fire. It is a whole world of wickedness, corrupting your entire body. It can set your whole life on fire, for it is set on fire by hell itself.
6.note: Or for it will burn in hell Gehenna

12.anchor: Does a fig tree produce olives, or a grapevine produce figs? No, and you can’t draw fresh water from a salty spring.

18.anchor: And those who are peacemakers will plant seeds of peace and reap a harvest of righteousness.
18.note: Or of good things, of justice.

13.anchor: And remember, when you are being tempted, do not say, “God is tempting me.” God is never tempted to do wrong,
13.note: Or God should not be put to a test by evil people.

17.anchor: Whatever is good and perfect is a gift coming down to us from God our Father, who created all the lights in the heavens.
17.note: Greek from above, from the Father of lights.

17.anchor: He never changes or casts a shifting shadow.
17.note: Some manuscripts read He never changes, as a shifting shadow does.

18.anchor: He chose to give birth to us by giving us his true word. And we, out of all creation, became his prized possession.
18.note: Greek we became a kind of firstfruit of his creatures.

2.anchor: For example, suppose someone comes into your meeting

7.anchor: Aren’t they the ones who slander Jesus Christ, whose noble name

8.anchor: Yes indeed, it is good when you obey the royal law as found in the Scriptures: “Love your neighbor as yourself.”

11.anchor: For the same God who said, “You must not commit adultery,” also said, “You must not murder.”

19.anchor: You say you have faith, for you believe that there is one God.
19.note: Some manuscripts read that God is one;

23.anchor: And so it happened just as the Scriptures say: “Abraham believed God, and God counted him as righteous because of his faith.”
He was even called the friend of God.

26.anchor: Just as the body is dead without breath,
